main.summary: Runs the command and binds binary CliWrap output and error streams to callbacks.

field.name: observer
field.summary: Binary Command Observer used to receive notifications and data.

field.name: buffered
field.summary: Indicates whether RunAsync will return a with binary output buffers.

field.name: StdOutPipe
field.summary: Pipe that receives standard output bytes from the CliWrap command.

field.name: StdErrPipe
field.summary: Pipe that receives standard error bytes from the CliWrap command.

field.name: StdOut
field.summary: Stream view over the StdOutPipe reader, passed to the BinaryCommandObserver and used for buffering.

field.name: StdErr
field.summary: Stream view over the StdErrPipe reader, passed to the BinaryCommandObserver and used for buffering.

constructor.name: Constructor
constructor.summary: Initializes a new BinaryCommandRunner with the specified observer and buffering behavior.
constructor.param: True to return a with binary output; false to stream output to the observer.

method.name: CreateStdOutTarget
method.summary: Creates a PipeTarget that copies standard output bytes into the StdOutPipe.
method.returns: PipeTarget that writes stdout into the pipe.

method.name: CreateStdErrTarget
method.summary: Creates a PipeTarget that copies standard error bytes into the StdErrPipe.
method.returns: PipeTarget that writes stderr into the pipe.

method.name: RunAsync
method.summary: Runs the specified CliWrap command, wiring its output and error streams into the observer and returning the final result.
method.param: Forceful cancellation token for the command.
Graceful cancellation token for the command.
method.returns: Task that produces a when the command and observer processing have completed.

method.name: CreateBufferedResultAsync
method.summary: Creates a by reading all remaining data from the stdout and stderr streams.
method.param: Base command result to augment with binary output.
Cancellation token used when reading the streams.
method.returns: Task producing the buffered binary command result.
